default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Content audit and workflow improvement discussion between Matthew Panzarino, Nemanja Simic, and Elvis Goren.](https://fathom.video/share/QNAaoo58JRxofMyeKzG6v6rnLm8sGJDB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current content workflows have issues with quality, efficiency, and customization for clients](https://fathom.video/share/QNAaoo58JRxofMyeKzG6v6rnLm8sGJDB?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [New platform and sprint team approach being implemented to address workflow problems](https://fathom.video/share/QNAaoo58JRxofMyeKzG6v6rnLm8sGJDB?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Need for client-specific custom workflows and improved handoff processes](https://fathom.video/share/QNAaoo58JRxofMyeKzG6v6rnLm8sGJDB?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Transition from AirOps to new internal platform by mid-June](https://fathom.video/share/QNAaoo58JRxofMyeKzG6v6rnLm8sGJDB?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality and Editing

  - [LLM-generated content often needs human editing for readability and narrative flow](https://fathom.video/share/QNAaoo58JRxofMyeKzG6v6rnLm8sGJDB?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Issues with overly templated headlines, anemic introductions, and choppy narrative structure](https://fathom.video/share/QNAaoo58JRxofMyeKzG6v6rnLm8sGJDB?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Suggestion to allow content "room to breathe" while maintaining client-specific tone preferences](https://fathom.video/share/QNAaoo58JRxofMyeKzG6v6rnLm8sGJDB?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)

### Workflow Challenges

  - [Current AirOps workflows not meeting efficiency needs; CMs developing workarounds](https://fathom.video/share/QNAaoo58JRxofMyeKzG6v6rnLm8sGJDB?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [Research, briefs, and polishing instructions identified as key problem areas](https://fathom.video/share/QNAaoo58JRxofMyeKzG6v6rnLm8sGJDB?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Need for client-specific custom workflows instead of one-size-fits-all approach](https://fathom.video/share/QNAaoo58JRxofMyeKzG6v6rnLm8sGJDB?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)

### New Platform and Process

  - [Transitioning off AirOps to new internal platform by mid-June](https://fathom.video/share/QNAaoo58JRxofMyeKzG6v6rnLm8sGJDB?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)
  - [Implementing sprint teams for new client onboarding (2-3 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/QNAaoo58JRxofMyeKzG6v6rnLm8sGJDB?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [Sprint teams to include high-level staff (e.g., Marcel, Ada, Daniel) initially](https://fathom.video/share/QNAaoo58JRxofMyeKzG6v6rnLm8sGJDB?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Goal: Create custom workflows and steady-state deliverables before handing off to pods](https://fathom.video/share/QNAaoo58JRxofMyeKzG6v6rnLm8sGJDB?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
